records.ety: [L., fr. Gr. <?/, pl. <?/, from the land itself; a'yto`s self + <?/ earth, land.]

defs: One who is supposed to rise or spring from the ground or the soil he inhabits; one of the original inhabitants or aborigines; a native; -- commonly in the plural. This title was assumed by the ancient Greeks, particularly the Athenians.
That which is original to a particular country, or which had there its origin.
